goal: Add structured logging with log levels to replace print-based logging
context: Python application using simple print-based logging. Replace with structured logging that supports log levels and timestamps.

tasks.title: Add log levels and structured output
tasks.goal: Refactor logger.py to support log levels (DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR) and output structured JSON log lines.
constraints: Use stdlib only, no external logging framework
Each log line must be valid JSON

tasks.title: Update application to use log levels
tasks.goal: Update app.py to use the new log level functions (info, error, debug) instead of generic log/log_error.
constraints: Use appropriate log levels for each message
acceptance: app.py uses info() for normal messages and error() for errors
